prompts.title: Example Action Prompts
prompts.subtitle: Practical tasks to move your academic struggles forward
items: Complete a comprehensive academic self-assessment by rating your current performance in each subject on a 1-10 scale
Schedule and attend office hours with your most challenging professor to discuss specific concepts you\
Take a learning style assessment and identify which study methods align best with your natural learning preferences
Create a detailed time audit by tracking exactly how you spend each hour for one full week, including study time, class time, and breaks
Compile a list of all your current assignments, tests, and deadlines with their due dates and create a priority ranking system
Meet with your academic advisor to review your transcript and identify patterns in your struggling courses
